I come against all satanic vows, pacts, spiritual bonding, soul ties, and demonic forces and sever ties, transmission of those links through my ancestry. I comes against the effect of all links with psychics, clairvoyants, astrologers, occult seers, and fortune tellers. I renounce any participation in seances, divination, activity with tarot cards, Ouija boards, astrology, and occult games of all kinds.

I come against all satanic vows, pacts, spiritual bonding, soul ties, and demonic forces and sever ties, transmission of those links through my ancestry. I comes against the effect of all links with psychics, clairvoyants, astrologers, occult seers, and fortune tellers.

Heavenly Father, in the Name of Jesus Christ, Your Son, through the Immaculate Heart of Mary. I concentrate on your Mercy for this land, this house, this family, our relationship, and everything that belongs to us.
